parents.subject: LU-18051 ofd: Initialize the buffer for lvbo_update properly

commit.subject: LU-18141 obdclass: don't check for NULL before free'ing
commit.message:
LU-18141 obdclass: don't check for NULL before free'ing

The common free'ing macros already check for NULL,
so we don't need to explicitly check this beforehand.

The patch has been generated with the coccinelle script below.

@@
expression E;
@@
- if (E != NULL)
(
  OBD_FREE_PTR(E);
|
  OBD_FREE(E, ...);
|
  LIBCFS_FREE(E, ...);
|
  CFS_FREE_PTR(E);
|
  CFS_FREE_PTR_ARRAY(E, ...);
)

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: Ie5d5567fecc1f421fb0894816c880b41ea93843b
